steps.title: Spot the location shift
steps.content: The passage presents one example at the University of Texas, then immediately mentions Howard University—a different city. The transition must signal movement to another location while maintaining the same illustrative function.

steps.title: Apply the location signal
steps.content: ”Elsewhere” signals movement to another location. The other three options each misfire—restating, concluding, or narrowing focus instead of marking a geographic shift. This matches choice B — B is correct.
